Row.Text: A Grand Market is an upgrade to the default Market, adding more [ICON_GOLD] Gold to your city. A Market must be in the city before a Grand Market.
A Grand Market is an upgrade to the default Market, adding more [ICON_GOLD] Gold to your city. A Market must be in the city before a Grand Market.
A Grand Market is an upgrade to the default Market, adding more [ICON_GOLD] Gold to your city. A Market must be in the city before a Grand Market.
